events.title: US and Iran reach preliminary deal to end war, reopen Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The United States and Iran announced a preliminary agreement to end their prolonged conflict, with a key aspect being the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. This development has led to a significant drop in oil prices.

events.title: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut amid Iran-US deal negotiations
events.desc: Israel conducted air strikes targeting Hezbollah positions in Beirut. This action occurred as Iran warned of potential resumption of hostilities if such attacks continued, raising concerns about derailing the ongoing US-Iran peace deal.

events.title: Russian missile and drone attacks hit Kyiv and other Ukrainian cities
events.desc: A significant overnight missile and drone attack orchestrated by Russia has struck Kyiv, Kharkiv, and several other cities across Ukraine, resulting in casualties and damage to infrastructure, including a historic cathedral in Kyiv.

events.title: G7 leaders meet in France to discuss Iran deal and global challenges
events.desc: Leaders of the G7 nations convened in France to discuss the implications of the newly announced US-Iran peace deal, alongside other pressing global issues such as the war in Ukraine and economic imbalances.

events.title: Lebanon warns displaced against returning home despite US-Iran deal
events.desc: Lebanese authorities have cautioned displaced individuals against returning to their homes in the southern part of the country, even as a US-Iran deal aims to end the broader conflict. Israel has indicated it will not withdraw its troops from the south.

events.title: US strikes oil tanker, killing three Indian sailors
events.desc: The US military conducted a strike on a Palau-flagged oil tanker, resulting in the deaths of three Indian sailors. The US claimed the vessel failed to comply with directions prior to the attack.

events.title: Iran war live updates: Tehran claims peace deal ends US blockade
events.desc: Reports from Tehran indicate that the recently agreed-upon peace deal will terminate the US blockade, with expectations that the Strait of Hormuz will reopen upon the deal's formal signing.

events.title: Israeli airstrikes hit southern Lebanon, reports indicate 17 killed
events.desc: Multiple Israeli air strikes in southern Lebanon have reportedly resulted in 17 fatalities, with nine deaths occurring in the town of Tayr Debba according to Lebanese state news agency reports.

events.title: UK, France, Germany, Italy ready to lift Iran sanctions post-US-Iran deal
events.desc: The UK, France, Germany, and Italy have indicated readiness to lift sanctions on Iran, contingent on Iran's actions regarding its nuclear program, following the US-Iran agreement to end hostilities.

events.title: Satellite imagery reveals extensive demolitions in southern Lebanon
events.desc: New satellite imagery indicates significant destruction across towns and villages in southern Lebanon within the IDF's 'Yellow Line,' with many settlements heavily damaged or completely flattened.

events.title: Russian submunitions found in Mali after military airstrikes
events.desc: Unexploded Russian-made cluster munition bomblets have been discovered in northern Mali, following the Malian military's announcement of airstrikes in the region.

events.title: Banned Russian submunitions found after Mali's military announces airstrikes
events.desc: Investigation reveals unexploded Russian-made cluster munition bomblets, banned under international convention, were found in Mali following the country's military airstrikes.

events.title: Iran claims 'peace deal' ends US blockade and war on all fronts
events.desc: Tehran has asserted that the 'peace deal' agreed upon with the US will result in the immediate cessation of military operations on all fronts and the termination of the US blockade.

events.title: Iran war: Iran, US reach a tentative deal to end conflict
events.desc: Both the US President Donald Trump and Iranian leaders have announced an agreement in principle to end the protracted war that has lasted over 100 days.

events.title: US and Iran announce 'understanding' to end the war
events.desc: The United States and Iran have jointly announced a memorandum of understanding intended to bring an end to the ongoing war and facilitate the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.
